---
name: Bug report
about: A persona or skill behaves incorrectly (false positive, crash, wrong scope)
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of the behavior, including which persona or skill
(`/personas:audit`, `/personas:panel`, or a specific agent).

## Expected

What you expected instead.

## Repro

- Command run:
- Target repo / URL (or a minimal sample):
- `personas.config.json` binding used (redact anything private):

## False positive?

If a finding was wrong, paste the finding and the actual code/line it flagged,
and explain why it's a false positive — this helps tighten the persona's
guardrails.

## Environment

- Claude Code version:
- Plugin version (`.claude-plugin/plugin.json`):
- OS:
